name: Cosmog
description: Its body is made of a gaseous nebula material. It gathers dust from space to grow, slowly condensing stellar matter in its core.
originLore: Cosmog is a nebular seed — gaseous stellar dust condensing into a future ultra wormhole. It drifts, gathering cosmic matter until destiny forces metamorphosis.

lore.celestialConcordance: Innocent and unfinished, Cosmog holds the compressed blueprint of Solgaleo and Lunala within its haze.

quantumResonators.name: Teleport
quantumResonators.description: Blinks short distances by folding local space-dust.

quantumResonators.name: Nebula Drift
quantumResonators.description: Ignores opposing stat stages while gathering stellar mass.
